title: boltonia decurrens
intro: Boltonia decurrens, also known as drooping false aster, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to eastern North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Boltonia decurrens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
